'''golawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jejunocaecal|jejunocaecal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jejunocaecal|jejunocaecal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| golawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:golawithi|golawithi]] || [[word:golawiji|golawiji]] || [[word:golawishi|golawishi]] || [[word:golawiki|golawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:golawuthuthu|golawuthuthu]] || [[word:golawujuju|golawujuju]] || [[word:golawushushu|golawushushu]] || [[word:golawukuku|golawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:golawuthu|golawuthu]] || [[word:golawuju|golawuju]] || [[word:golawushu|golawushu]] || [[word:golawuku|golawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:golawufthuf|golawufthuf]] || [[word:golawufjuf|golawufjuf]] || [[word:golawufshuf|golawufshuf]] || [[word:golawufkuf|golawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:golawethe|golawethe]] || [[word:golaweje|golaweje]] || [[word:golaweshe|golaweshe]] || [[word:golaweke|golaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:golawothotho|golawothotho]] || [[word:golawojojo|golawojojo]] || [[word:golawoshosho|golawoshosho]] || [[word:golawokoko|golawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:golawotho|golawotho]] || [[word:golawojo|golawojo]] || [[word:golawosho|golawosho]] || [[word:golawoko|golawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:golawofthof|golawofthof]] || [[word:golawofjof|golawofjof]] || [[word:golawofshof|golawofshof]] || [[word:golawofkof|golawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:golawÃŸfthÃŸf|golawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfjÃŸf|golawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfshÃŸf|golawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfkÃŸf|golawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:golawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|golawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|golawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|golawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|golawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:golawÃŸfthÃŸf|golawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfjÃŸf|golawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfshÃŸf|golawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfkÃŸf|golawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:golawÃŸfthÃŸf|golawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfjÃŸf|golawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfshÃŸf|golawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:golawÃŸfkÃŸf|golawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:golawÃḊthÃḊ|golawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:golawÃḊjÃḊ|golawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:golawÃḊshÃḊ|golawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:golawÃḊkÃḊ|golawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:golawathatha|golawathatha]] || [[word:golawajaja|golawajaja]] || [[word:golawashasha|golawashasha]] || [[word:golawakaka|golawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:golawatha|golawatha]] || [[word:golawaja|golawaja]] || [[word:golawasha|golawasha]] || [[word:golawaka|golawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:golawafthaf|golawafthaf]] || [[word:golawafjaf|golawafjaf]] || [[word:golawafshaf|golawafshaf]] || [[word:golawafkaf|golawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:golawasha|golawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:golawshÃḋsha|golawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golawrosha|golawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golawmusha|golawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:golawyasha|golawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogolawnkshÃḋsha|gogolawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogolawnkrosha|gogolawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogolawnkmusha|gogolawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogolawnkyasha|gogolawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:golalawasha|golalawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:golalawshÃḋsha|golalawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golalawrosha|golalawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golalawmusha|golalawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:golalawyasha|golalawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogolalawnkshÃḋsha|gogolalawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogolalawnkrosha|gogolalawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogolalawnkmusha|gogolalawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogolalawnkyasha|gogolalawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gelÃḊwasha|gelÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gelÃḊwshÃḋsha|gelÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gelÃḊwrosha|gelÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gelÃḊwmusha|gelÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gelÃḊwyasha|gelÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogelÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gogelÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogelÃḊwnkrosha|gogelÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogelÃḊwnkmusha|gogelÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogelÃḊwnkyasha|gogelÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:golfawasha|golfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:golfawshÃḋsha|golfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golfawrosha|golfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golfawmusha|golfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:golfawyasha|golfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogolfawnkshÃḋsha|gogolfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogolfawnkrosha|gogolfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogolfawnkmusha|gogolfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogolfawnkyasha|gogolfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
